nasb.text: Jehoiakim was twenty-five years old when he became king, and he reigned eleven years in Jerusalem; and he did evil in the sight of the Lord his God.

esv.text: Jehoiakim was twenty-five years old when he began to reign, and he reigned eleven years in Jerusalem. He did what was evil in the sight of the Lord his God.

cnv.text: 約雅敬登基的時候，是二十五歲；他在耶路撒冷作王共十一年，行耶和華他的　神看為惡的事。

ccb.text: 约雅敬二十五岁登基，在耶路撒冷执政十一年。他做他的上帝耶和华视为恶的事。
